query: I want to build a new skill that converts messy CSV exports into clean formatted markdown tables - help me create it from scratch.
Review my SKILL.md before I publish it - check the description triggers well, the frontmatter is right, and it's within token budget.
Write a trigger eval set for my new skill's description and run it to see whether it over- or under-fires.
Before I publish my new skill, check whether its description clashes with the discovery triggers of the other skills I already have, and tell me which ones overlap.
i think my new skill's 'use when' is stepping on an existing skill of mine - can you compare the two descriptions and tell me whether an agent would get confused about which one to load?
I've written a skill for tidying up Jira tickets and I want to add it to the ai toolkit - help me get it ready to contribute.
Just need to tweak the allowed-tools and bump the version in my existing skill's frontmatter - nothing major, can you make that change?
Use the find-docs skill to pull the latest Stripe webhooks API reference for me.
What skills are installed in my Claude Code setup right now, and which ones are slash commands?
Write a Python script that scaffolds a new project directory with a Makefile, a src folder and a basic pyproject.toml.
Add a section to my project's README.md documenting the build and deploy steps for new contributors.
Add this MCP server config to the ai toolkit and bundle it into a plugin so my team can install it.
